_doc: Same ICSBEP HEU-MET-FAST-001 case, but driving the engine through SVD k=5 (instead of pointwise Table). Two parallel manifests with shared k_ref let the regression CSV show that both providers pass the benchmark to within σ_exp — the headline number behind §pwr / §godiva in the paper.

benchmark.source: ICSBEP Handbook, HMF-001 — internal SVD-mode parallel of the canonical Table case
